demographics.living_situation: lives entirely alone in a private residence; a concerned neighbour checks on her and is present for this call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (Neighbour calling, patient on the line and very tearful) She keeps saying 'I just feel completely empty; nobody cares if I live or die in this house, and the panic is crushing my chest.' She hasn't eaten or had anything to drink for two days and I found her still in bed — I only noticed because her mail had been piling up for a week.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sudden bad panic attack tonight with a crushing tight feeling in the chest, on top of not eating or drinking for two days and not coping alone.

symptom_narrative.onset: the panic and chest tightness came on this evening; the not-eating-or-drinking has been going on for about 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: panic tonight; two days of no food or fluids; withdrawal and loneliness building over the last six months
symptom_narrative.character: a crushing tight feeling across the chest with the panic; crying uncontrollably; feels completely empty and abandoned
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says the panic feels overwhelming and the chest tightness is frightening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest tightness across the front of the chest; low mood and exhaustion all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the panic comes in waves tonight; the low mood and isolation are constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: having the neighbour there and someone to talk to seems to settle the panic a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: being alone in the house, and thinking about how cut off she is
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever or shivers mentioned; no vomiting or diarrhoea; says the chest tightness is not brought on by walking or exertion and does not spread to the arm or jaw
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she has been making more frequent minor visits to the clinic over recent months, she says just to have someone to talk to
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally manages independently but is currently bedbound with exhaustion and distress, not washing, cooking or eating

past_medical_history.how_managed: usually on a daily blood-pressure tablet

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives entirely alone with no regular family, friend or community contact over the past six months; has withdrawn from social groups including her local church; the neighbour is her only regular contact and found her after a week of uncollected mail

communication_style.typical_message_style: tearful, expresses feeling abandoned and frightened; grasps for reassurance and human contact

access_barriers.other: no family or social support network; relies on a single neighbour

objective_data_offered.value: neighbour reports she has not eaten or had anything to drink for about two days and has been in bed all day
neighbour says she looks unwell and run-down, has lost noticeable weight recently, and is not washing or looking after herself
on video she appears dishevelled, unwashed, tearful and very anxious
the house is cold, dark and very cluttered; the fridge reportedly contains only spoiled food
